titel:
New analysis on the most dangerous criminal networks within the European Union.

html: European Commission Press Release, Brussels, June 26, 2026. Today, the European Commission, Europol, and the Cypriot presidency of the Council of the European Union are presenting a new analysis from Europol regarding the most dangerous criminal networks within the EU.
tldr: European Union agencies have released a new report identifying the criminal networks that pose the greatest threat to security in Europe.
lattlast:
The European Commission and the European Police Agency (Europol), together with the leadership of Cyprus, have presented a new analysis. The report focuses on criminal groups that pose the greatest threat to security within the EU.

The purpose of the analysis is to provide better understanding of how these criminal networks operate and which areas they impact most significantly. By understanding their methods, authorities can work more effectively to combat crime.

The information was published on June 26, 2026, in Brussels. The report is a collaboration between several important EU organizations aimed at increasing the safety and security of all citizens.
